title: Amounts as decimal strings
capability: represent money as decimal strings and send the full per-line VAT breakdown that reconciles to the cent
persona_ref: PERSONA.md week 2 model impedance; NOTES.md money-model (amounts are strings; VatRateCategory needs all four fields)

traps.detail: amounts serialized as JSON floats and only a single total is sent; no percentage/amount/exclusive/inclusive breakdown
traps.correct: send every amount as a decimal string matching the API pattern, include the full VatRateCategory per line, and reconcile to the cent
